nodes.context: Brazilian criminal organization engaged in drug trafficking in Rio de Janeiro, founded in early 1980s as a break-away faction of Comando Vermelho.
Rival criminal organization in Rio de Janeiro, from which Terceiro Comando broke away.

edges.evidence_quote: It was founded in the early 1980s and is a break-away faction of the Comando Vermelho.
edges.context: Terceiro Comando was formed as a splinter group from Comando Vermelho.

edges.evidence_quote: The Terceiro Comando has fought several small-scale conflicts (in 2001 and 2004) with the rival gang Comando Vermelho.
edges.context: Terceiro Comando fought conflicts with Comando Vermelho in 2001 and 2004.
